content:
## Customer Eligibility
1. Use these terms only for referrals tied to a Sky Blue Account.
2. The program category is business_checking, so do not apply these terms to personal checking, savings, lending, or other business account offers.
3. The referred business must be no older than 4 years when eligibility is reviewed.
4. The referred customer must make at least 10000 in qualifying deposits for the referred-customer bonus to apply.

## Referrer Requirements
1. The referrer must have held the qualifying relationship for at least 90 days before the referral is counted.
2. A referrer may receive no more than 5 Sky Blue Account referral bonuses in a year.
3. If the customer asks about other business checking offers, compare only against the listed business referral documents. See "Business Checking Referral Programs" for broader business checking referral handling.

## Bonus Terms
| Party | Bonus |
| --- | --- |
| Referrer | 400 |
| Referred customer | 120 |

Apply the referrer and referred-customer bonuses separately. A referred customer can satisfy the deposit requirement without making the referrer eligible if the referrer has not met the tenure requirement or has already reached the annual cap. For general cap and eligibility interpretation, see "Referral Limits And Eligibility".
title: Sky Blue Account Referral Terms
